rationale: The cited paper is used mainly as part of broad prior-literature listings (e.g., the cross-selling literature table) and in a grouped citation to justify product-category aggregation as accepted practice. The citing paper does not explicitly use or adapt the cited paper's specific multivariate multiple-response estimation approach in its own core model. Instead, its substantive methodological contribution is framed around its own hidden Markov multivariate probit setup and dynamic programming optimization.
